demo.intro: Iron Verdict allows judges to pick the reason for an invalid lift, shared instantly with athletes, audience, jury, and fellow judges. Available reasons are based on the IPF technical rulebook (effective date 01 March 2026 - version 3).
demo.athletes: Know your mistake immediately, no time wasted.
demo.audience: No more guessing why a lift was ruled invalid.
demo.judges: Understand your colleagues' calls and know what to focus on next attempt.
demo.jury: Know exactly which part of the lift to review before overruling.
demo.setupStep1: Enter a session name → click Create New Session
demo.setupStep2: Send the session code to other judges or scan QR code
demo.setupStep3: Use the session code to set up a Display Screen
demo.showReasonsDesc: Show reasons on display — ruling reasons appear on the display screen
demo.requireReasonsDesc: Require reasons — judges must choose a reason before locking in (optional by default)
demo.liftCategoryDesc: Lift category dropdown — changes the reason catalogue (Squat / Bench / Deadlift)
demo.duringStep1: Head judge announces "The bar is loaded" and presses Start Timer
demo.duringStep2: After the lift, judges press their color, optionally pick a reason, then press Lock In
demo.duringStep3: When all 3 judges lock in, the result appears on the Display Screen
demo.duringStep4: Head judge presses Next Lift to reset for the next lifter
demo.duringStep5: If needed, head judge presses Reset Timer
demo.duringStep6: After the event: End Session → confirm with OK
demo.popupNote: This demo is designed for desktop — it opens 4 pop-up windows to simulate 3 judges and a display running in parallel. Please allow pop-ups if prompted.
demo.demoRunning: Demo running — interact with the 4 open windows

contact.name: Name
contact.sentSub: We'll get back to you if you left an email.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
